data.title: Peoples Financial Services Corp. reported a Q2 2025 net income of $17.0 million (EPS $1.68), up from $15.0 million in Q1. Overall, net income for H1 2025 was $32.0 million, compared to $6.7 million in H1 2024. Key metrics like ROAA and ROAE improved, attributed to higher net interest income and lower credit losses provisions. The company completed a merger, leading to increased assets, income, and efficiencies. Dividend increased by 50.6% in Q2 2025, significant balance sheet growth noted. The company maintained solid asset quality. comprehensive financial details available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Peoples Financial Services Corp. reported net income of $17.0 million for the three months ended June 30, 2025, with a net income of $32.0 million for the six months ended June 30, 2025. This increase was attributed to higher net interest income and noninterest income, as well as a lower provision for credit losses. The company completed a merger in July 2024, leading to increased interest-earning assets and transaction volumes. Key metrics include a return on average assets of 1.36%, return on average equity of 13.87%, and an efficiency ratio of 53.92% for the three months ended June 30, 2025. Notable figures include total assets, loans, and deposits at $5.1 billion, $4.0 billion, and $4.3 billion respectively at June 30, 2025. The company's stockholders' equity equaled $494.1 million or $49.44 per share at June 30, 2025. Nonperforming assets were $17.4 million or 0.44% of loans, net, and foreclosed assets at June 30, 2025. Additionally, the Company redeemed $33.0 million of its subordinated notes and issued $85.0 million in new notes during June 2025.

data.title: Q2 2025: Patrick Industries' net sales increased 3% to $1.05 billion, with net income at $32 million and adjusted diluted EPS at $1.50. Adjusted EBITDA increased 4% to $135 million. Cash flow from operating activities grew to $189 million, and free cash flow was $262 million. Share repurchases totaled over $23 million, and regular dividends amounted to $13 million. Total net liquidity was $835 million, and a total net leverage ratio of 2.6x was reported. Operating income increased 2% to $87 million. There was a legal settlement related to a motor vehicle accident, resulting in a double-fatality. A webcast on their earnings conference call scheduled on July 31, 2025. Total debt stood at approximately $1.3 billion, with available liquidity at $835 million. The company remained disciplined in capital allocation. RV revenue increased 7%, Marine revenue decreased 1%, Powersports revenue decreased 7%, and Housing revenue increased 3%. Operating income was $87 million, with a margin of 8.3%. Comparable financial data from Q2 2024 provided for better understanding. Full financial data and forward-looking statements available in the release. Full story available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Patrick Industries, a component solutions provider for the Outdoor Enthusiast and Housing markets, reported a 3% increase in net sales to $1.05 billion. This growth was driven by a 7% increase in the RV business and a 3% increase in Housing business, offsetting reductions of 1% and 7% in Marine and Powersports businesses, respectively. Operating income increased 2% to $87 million, with operating margin at 8.3%. Net income was $32 million, with adjusted net income at $51 million and adjusted diluted EPS at $1.50. Adjusted EBITDA increased 4% to $135 million, and cash flow provided by operating activities grew to $189 million. The company returned $36.5 million to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends. Total net liquidity was $835 million, while total debt was approximately $1.3 billion, resulting in a total net leverage ratio of 2.6x. The company remains optimistic about market resilience and strategic growth opportunities. Jeff Rodino, President - RV, emphasized the company's focus on operational adjustments, new product development, and acquisitions to capitalize on market conditions. The company's revenue by market sector in the second quarter of 2025 showed growth in the RV and Housing sectors, while Marine and Powersports sectors experienced declines. Patrick Industries remains committed to driving profitable growth and value for stakeholders while adapting to changing market dynamics.

data.title: Baylin Technologies to discuss financial results for three and six months ended June 2025 on August 7, 2025 at 10 a.m.
data.description: Baylin Technologies Inc., a global wireless technology company listed on the TSX under the symbol BYL, will be conducting a conference call on Thursday, August 7, 2025, at 10 a.m. (Eastern Time). The call aims to review the financial outcomes for the three and six months concluding on June 20, 2025. The conference call will be led by Leighton Carroll, the Chief Executive Officer, and Cliff Gary, the Chief Financial Officer. For additional details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Wheels Up to release second quarter 2025 results on August 7, 2025 - Source: PRNewswire
data.description: Wheels Up Experience Inc., a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol UP, shared that they will unveil their financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 7, 2025. This announcement was made on July 31, 2025, from Atlanta. For more details, the complete news can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Second patient with acute myeloid leukemia dosed with CER-1236, promising update on first patient, protocol evaluations initiated.
data.description: The second patient in the initial group is currently undergoing scheduled assessments as the Company delivers positive news on the pharmacokinetic findings for the first patient.

data.title: ARRIS appoints Dolby CEO Kevin Yeaman to its board of directors, bringing expertise in licensing and technology scaling.
data.description: Arris, a top player in advanced manufacturing for high-performance composites, has recently named Kevin as their new CEO. With a background in licensing, brand-building, and technology scaling from his time as CEO of Dolby, Kevin is expected to bring valuable expertise to support Arris' growth. The appointment was made public in Berkeley, California, on July 31, 2025. This move signifies Arris' focus on further expanding their market presence and enhancing their technological capabilities under Kevin's leadership.

data.title: Ashley Swain to offer advanced PMU training for experienced pros in Palm Beach Gardens, FL in fall 2025. 30-year expert.
data.description: Renowned PMU specialist Ashley Swain has announced the launch of an innovative training program tailored for skilled professionals in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida. This initiative was unveiled on July 31, 2025, at Ashley Swain Permanent Makeup & Medspa, an esteemed establishment catering to permanent makeup enthusiasts in Palm Beach County.

data.title: Home prices drop in 14 major U.S. metros, including Oakland (-6.8%), West Palm Beach (-4.9%) and Houston (-2.8%).
data.description: In Seattle, the median home-sale price dropped in 14 of the 50 most populous U.S. metro areas this week, as per a recent report from Redfin. The largest decline was observed in Oakland, CA, with a significant 6.8% year-over-year decrease. Following closely were West Palm Beach (-4.9%), Jacksonville (-3.1%), Austin (-2.9%), and Houston (-2.8%), all experiencing notable reductions in prices. The sluggish housing market is attributed to the high house inventory in these areas.

data.title: OneRail recognized for fourth time in 2025 Gartner Hype Cycle for Smart City Technologies, helps reduce delivery costs and improve SLA performance.
data.description: OneRail, a prominent provider of last mile omnichannel fulfillment solutions, has been recognized as a Sample Vendor for Last Mile Delivery (LMD) Solutions in the 2025 Gartner Hype Cycle for Smart City Technologies and Solutions. This marks the fourth consecutive inclusion for OneRail. Their solution aims to assist retailers, distributors, and city planners in lowering delivery expenses, enhancing SLA performance, and adjusting to urban mobility trends. By offering scalable and real-time fulfillment services, OneRail addresses the evolving needs of the market.

data.title: MaxCyte partners with Anocca AB for non-viral gene editing in TCR-T cell therapies, using Flow Electroporation® Technology.
data.description: MaxCyte's Flow Electroporation® Technology is set to aid in the production of Anocca's TCR-T cell treatments through non-viral gene editing. This collaboration will enhance the efficiency and capabilities in the manufacturing process of these therapies. This development highlights the importance of innovative technologies in the medical field, with potential significant impacts on the biotechnology sector. It showcases MaxCyte's expertise and contributions to advancing gene editing in therapy production, ultimately benefiting patients and healthcare systems.

data.title: Dun & Bradstreet launches D&B Healthcare Insights add-on for D&B Hoovers to enhance sales & marketing strategies in healthcare.
data.description: Dun & Bradstreet (NYSE:DNB) has introduced D&B Healthcare Insights, an enhancement available as an add-on to D&B Hoovers, bringing advanced capabilities to boost sales and marketing tactics for commercial triumph. This offering aims to refine strategies for driving success in the healthcare sector. The announcement was made in Jacksonville, Fla., on July 31, 2025. As a prominent player in business data and analytics worldwide, Dun & Bradstreet continues to innovate and empower industries with valuable solutions.

data.title: 73% of workers plan to stay in their current roles through 2025, citing job satisfaction. Flexibility and workplace culture contribute to their decision.
data.description: A recent study from a talent solutions and business consulting firm in Menlo Park, California reveals that job satisfaction is being influenced by factors such as flexibility, professional fulfillment, and a positive workplace culture. The research indicates that an increasing number of job seekers are showing interest in pursuing a career in contracting. This study, conducted in July 2025, highlights the importance of these aspects in the workplace and suggests a shifting trend towards greater emphasis on work-life balance and career fulfillment.

data.title: Andronaco's Diamond Fiberglass Brand emphasizes RTP-1 certification with multiple locations for FRP vessels and tanks.
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, on July 31, 2025, it was highlighted that various sectors are increasingly recognizing the significance of certifications and standards in improving their operations. Specifically in the industrial equipment sector, certifications play a crucial role, particularly in ensuring the safety of vital components such as tanks. This emphasis on certification underscores the growing importance of regulatory compliance and quality assurance in industries dealing with safety-sensitive elements.

data.title: Vericel discloses Q2 2025 financial data, showing significant growth in revenue and earnings.
data.description: A recent report states that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% this year, which is an upward revision from the previous forecast of 4.1%. This increase is mainly driven by strong economic performance in emerging markets, with China leading the way with a growth rate of 8.5%. The United States is also showing a promising recovery with an estimated growth of 6.5%. However, there are concerns about inflation rates rising to 4.4% globally, which could have an impact on consumer spending and overall economic stability. The report also highlights the importance of vaccination efforts in controlling the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic and ensuring a sustainable economic recovery worldwide.

data.title: Freddie Mac reports Q2 2025 financial results, files Form 10-Q with SEC. Visit website for details.
data.description: Freddie Mac, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, announced on July 31, 2025, that it has released its financial results for the Second Quarter of 2025. The company, listed under OTCQB as FMCC, also submitted its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Interested parties can access the firm's Form 10-Q, earnings press release, and the financial results supplement for the Second Quarter of 2025 on the Investor Relations section of the company's official website.

data.title: AestheticMatch expands nationwide, offering free matching service connecting patients to screened plastic surgeons.
data.description: Today, on July 31, 2025, in New York, AestheticMatch, a digital concierge located in Tribeca specializing in cosmetic procedures, has revealed the nationwide launch of its complimentary matching service. This service assists clients in finding suitable plastic surgeons who have met the company's strict standards. The rollout aims to cater to a larger audience across the country.

data.title: Unmind secures $35M funding led by TELUS Global Ventures to enhance workplace mental health with AI and data strategies.
data.description: A recent investment led by TELUS Global Ventures has propelled Unmind to offer advanced mental health solutions utilizing AI and data approaches to enhance organizational health, employee wellness, and business results. This funding was secured in New York and London on July 31, 2025. This strategic partnership aims to combine proactive and reactive mental health interventions to improve the outlook for workplaces and individuals.
